aligned_lyrics.text: It melts when I blink once
Slides down in a slow rush
I keep tracing your name on the window
Letters falling apart as they drip low
I keep chasing a blur in my mind’s glow
Same old scene on a loop in the night
Now I talk to the air
I keep tracing your name on the window
Letters falling apart as they drip low
I keep chasing a blur in my mind’s glow
Same old scene on a loop in the night
I keep tracing your name on the window
Letters falling apart as they drip low
I keep chasing a blur in my mind’s glow
Same old scene on a loop in the night
